one_minute_value_explanation: AOF can now show one provider-backed controlled execution candidate for operator go/no-go instead of forcing manual inspection across scattered readiness artifacts.
thirty_second_version_delta: v9.4 turns provider readiness evidence into one controlled execution candidate while keeping production execution unauthorized.
product_review_trigger: If users read v9.4 as live production provider execution, reopen as a product framing and safety-boundary issue.
not_proven: Capability delta does not prove live provider execution, semantic correctness, credential safety, billing safety, or market adoption.
